info.description: File sharing API with support for password-protected shares, expiring links, reverse shares, and admin user management.
info.title: Enlace API

post.description: Validates a recovery code against a pending 2FA token and returns JWT tokens on success. The recovery code is consumed (single-use).
Validates a TOTP code against a pending 2FA token and returns JWT tokens on success.
Authenticates a user and returns JWT tokens. When 2FA is enabled, returns a pending_token and requires_2fa flag instead; use /auth/2fa/verify to complete login.
Invalidates the current session. Since Enlace uses stateless JWTs, this endpoint always succeeds and the client is responsible for discarding the tokens.

get.description: Handles the OAuth 2.0 authorization code callback. Verifies state, exchanges the code for tokens, and redirects to the frontend with JWT tokens or an error fragment.
Returns whether OIDC/SSO login is enabled for this Enlace instance.
Initiates the OIDC authorization code flow with PKCE. Redirects the browser to the configured identity provider.

post.description: Exchanges a valid refresh token for a new access token and refresh token pair.
Creates a new user account. Email must be a valid address format and password must be at least 8 characters.

delete.description: Permanently deletes a file. Only the owner of the share containing this file may delete it.

get.description: Returns the current user's profile including email, display name, admin status, and 2FA/OIDC enrollment state.

patch.description: Updates the current user's display name and/or email address. At least one field must be provided.

post.description: Verifies a TOTP code from the authenticator app, enables 2FA, and returns recovery codes.
Disables two-factor authentication. Requires password confirmation.
Generates new recovery codes, replacing all existing ones. Requires password confirmation.
Generates a TOTP secret and returns a QR code for scanning with an authenticator app.

get.description: Returns the current user's 2FA enrollment status and whether the administrator has required 2FA.

delete.description: Removes the OIDC identity link from the current user account. Requires that the account has a local password set.

get.description: Handles the OAuth 2.0 callback for account linking. Verifies state, exchanges the code, and links the OIDC identity to the current user account.
Initiates the OIDC authorization code flow to link an external identity to the current user account.

put.description: Changes the current user's password. Requires the existing password for verification.

get.description: Returns all shares created by the current user.

post.description: Creates a new share. When recipients are supplied, notification emails are sent immediately on creation.

get.description: Returns full details of a share owned by the current user. Returns 404 for shares that do not exist or are not owned by the requester.

delete.description: Permanently deletes a share and all its associated files. Only the share owner may call this endpoint.

patch.description: Updates one or more fields of an existing share. Only the share owner may call this endpoint.

get.description: Returns all files attached to a share owned by the current user.

post.description: Uploads one or more files to a share using multipart/form-data. Only the share owner may upload files.
Sends or resends share notification emails to the specified recipients and records each delivery.

get.description: Returns the list of email addresses that have been notified about this share, along with their delivery timestamps.
Returns the application health status. Used by load balancers and container orchestrators to verify the service is running.
Returns share details and files. Requires X-Share-Token for password-protected shares.
Downloads a file from a public share. Use X-Share-Token header or token query param for password-protected shares.
Previews a file inline. Use X-Share-Token header or token query param for password-protected shares.

post.description: Uploads files to a public reverse share. No authentication required.
Returns a share access token (1-hour expiry) for password-protected shares.

display_name.description: Display name shown in the UI

ShareToken.description: Share access token for password-protected shares
ShareToken.name: X-Share-Token
